monsters.name: Void Stalker
monsters.description: A predator from the outer darkness. It moves with a terrifying, unnatural speed, its claws dripping with void ichor.

monsters.name: Abyssal Cultist
monsters.description: A figure in dark robes, chanting in an ancient, forbidden tongue. Their eyes are empty pits of darkness.

monsters.name: Shadow Beast
monsters.description: A mass of obsidian fur and glowing magenta eyes. It seems to phase in and out of existence.

monsters.name: Soul Reaper
monsters.description: A skeletal guardian clad in tattered black rags, holding a scythe of pure entropy. It hungers for the living.

monsters.name: Dark Knight
monsters.description: A suit of charred, hollowed-out armor fueled by dark magic and a grim sense of duty.
